full_text:
Cheng Jiu 成就
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Jiu (成就). Inspector of Liang during several barbarian incursions and recruited Dong Zhuo into his service. Cheng Jiu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
